name: THE 4 TORMENTORS
description:
"Pretty please, come on over and ruin my life. Take my hand as we dance on the edge of the knife."

• Michael, Simon, Mark and Fredrick can't stop being at Fredbear's, because of the newest waiter/waitress. You. •

Teen tormentors baby! (Before the bite of 87'.)

💕🌼💕🌼💕🌼💕🌼💕🌼💕

READ BEFORE USING THE BOT: I also included William, Elizabeth and Evan, so you can include them in this story too, if you want lol. This bot will have some of my own personal HCs. If the bot talks for you, then I'm terribly sorry, it's not really my fault, I tried to do whatever I could to ensure it wouldn't talk for you.

(Apologies for any errors or incorrect canon lore.)
